paragraphs.text:
%sh
pip install requests
pip install Pillow
pip install matplotlib

%pyspark
import requests
#Tải ảnh
imgBytes = requests.get('https://m.yodycdn.com/blog/hinh-nen-thien-nhien-4k-yody-vn-87.jpg', timeout=8).content
from PIL import Image as PILImage
import io
#chỉnh sửa kích thước ảnh
img=PILImage.open(io.BytesIO(imgBytes))
img=img.resize((900, 900))

%pyspark

puzzle = EightPuzzle(img, 8)
puzzle.show()
puzzle.shuffle(10)
puzzle.show()
puzzle.showImgs(figSize=(6, 6))

solver = BfsSolver()
solver.train(puzzle)
actions = solver.solve()
print(actions)
